positive: A maximalist, vintage scientific illustration of celestial botanicals. The arrangement features floating constellations, delicate silver ferns, deep blue moonflowers, and gilded gold accents. The style should mimic 18th-century natural history plates, combining detailed line art with soft watercolor washes. The background is a deep indigo sky, creating an ethereal, mystical mood. Highly detailed, symmetrical composition, elegant, academic, Art Nouveau influences, high resolution, museum quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, modern graffiti, cartoon, messy, messy composition
